description: Half-pixel snapping for axis-aligned paths ported from Vecto to SVG and PDF backends

examples.name: step-plot
examples.note: PDF not regenerated due to VoidChar font error

conclusion: Half-pixel snapping has negligible net impact on SVG/PDF SSIM. External rasterizers (ImageMagick for SVG, pdftoppm for PDF) apply their own anti-aliasing that masks sub-pixel coordinate changes. SVG step-plot regressed by 0.01 (likely ImageMagick AA interaction), other examples neutral or slightly improved. Change kept for correctness parity with Vecto backend.
